title: Minecraft, but gamemode randomizes!
description: Minecraft, but every 30 seconds your gamemode randomizes!
body:
This datapack **switches** your current gamemode with another **random gamemode**. It's perfect for challenges in **singleplayer** or **with friends**! Digit **/function: random_gamemode:start** to start the gamemode switcher and digit **/function: random_gamemode:stop** to stop it! If you want tips for challenges I reccomend you to don't pick up item from creative menu for an harder challenge. I hope you'll have fun with this datapack!
If you want to use it in your videos, feel free to use this pack without restriction, but if you want you can link this in your descriptions so other peoples can play this.
